characters.name: Mr White
characters.description: Curious and impulsive. A warm, affectionate father whose fascination with the unknown leads to devastating consequences.

characters.name: Mrs White
characters.description: Loving and practical, with strong emotional depth. Her arc moves from warmth to grief and desperation.

characters.name: Herbert White
characters.description: Playful, light-hearted and witty. His teasing nature contrasts with the darker events that unfold.

characters.name: Sergeant-Major Morris
characters.description: World-weary and authoritative. Brings a sense of foreboding with stories of his travels and the cursed object.

characters.name: Storyteller / Narrator
characters.description: Guides the audience through the story, setting tone and atmosphere. Strong presence and storytelling ability essential.

characters.name: 3-4x Devising Ensemble
characters.description:
These roles will be collaboratively developed, drawing on stories from the history of the theatre.
Previous devising or ensemble experience is desirable
Performers should be open to physical theatre, improvisation, and collaborative creation
